title: JMI Recruitment 2026 - Apply offline for Lab Attendant Posts
description: Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Lab Attendant Jobs. Candidates with a 12th Pass can grab this chance and apply for the JMI Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
